name: MrScraper
one_liner: AI-powered web scraping platform with pre-built marketplace scrapers and a REST API for extracting structured data from any website.
access_notes: Free 'Scraper Free' plan ($0/month) gives 1,000 API tokens and working API credentials with no payment or approval required. API access is enabled per-scraper via Settings > 'AI Scraper API Access', then copying the generated request with the token. Paid tiers (Standard, Pro, Enterprise) add residential proxies and higher concurrency; pay-as-you-go at $0.01/token beyond limits.
api_notes: REST HTTP API. Base URL https://api.mrscraper.com; marketplace scrapers via https://sync.scraper.mrscraper.com/api/. Core endpoint reruns an AI scraper (POST with scraperId, url, plus optional maxRetry, maxPages, timeout, stream). Plus a marketplace of many ready-made site-specific scrapers (e.g. Agoda reviews) each exposing endpoints. SDKs for Python, Node.js and LangChain.
mcp_notes: No vendor-shipped MrScraper MCP server found. Search surfaced only third-party/Apify and generic web-scraping MCP servers, not one published by MrScraper.
main_blocker: None significant; free tier provides working API credentials self-serve. Token budget on free tier is limited (1,000 tokens).

evidence.claim: Scraper API uses x-api-token header auth with scraperId/url/maxPages/stream params; API access enabled per-scraper via Settings.
Auth via token query param or x-api-token header; base URL https://api.mrscraper.com and marketplace at sync.scraper.mrscraper.com/api/.
Free plan ($0/mo, 1,000 tokens, 10 concurrent) is claimable at signup; pay-as-you-go $0.01/token beyond limit.
Platform supports webhooks, Zapier, n8n, SQL, and Python/Node.js/LangChain SDKs plus a marketplace of ready-to-run scrapers.

open_questions: Exact count of marketplace scraper endpoints (breadth estimated MODERATE); precise paid-plan pricing not displayed on public pricing page; whether free-tier tokens are sufficient for meaningful agent use.
